name: Strait of Hormuz
throughput: 21 million barrels/day oil (21% of global petroleum)
importance: Critical - Primary route for Persian Gulf oil exports to Asia, Europe, North America

name: Strait of Malacca
throughput: 16 million barrels/day oil, 40% of world maritime trade
importance: Critical - Main shipping channel between Indian and Pacific Oceans, essential for China/Japan/South Korea energy security

name: Suez Canal
throughput: 12% of global trade, 5-10 million barrels/day oil
importance: Critical - Shortcut between Europe and Asia, saves 8,900 km voyage around Africa

name: Bab el-Mandeb Strait
throughput: 6.2 million barrels/day oil northbound to Suez Canal
importance: Critical - Connects Red Sea to Gulf of Aden, vital for Europe-Asia trade and oil to Europe

name: Panama Canal
throughput: 6% of global maritime trade, 144 million tons LNG annually
importance: High - Connects Atlantic and Pacific, saves 8,000 nautical miles around South America

name: Turkish Straits (Bosphorus & Dardanelles)
throughput: 3 million barrels/day oil from Caspian/Black Sea
importance: High - Only route between Black Sea and Mediterranean, regulated by Montreux Convention

name: Strait of Dover / English Channel
importance: Medium - Critical European trade route between North Sea and Atlantic

name: Strait of Gibraltar
importance: High - Only natural entrance to Mediterranean Sea from Atlantic Ocean

name: Luzon Strait
throughput: Major oil/LNG route to China, Japan, South Korea
importance: Medium - Alternative to Malacca for Pacific-South China Sea transit

name: Sunda Strait
importance: Medium - Backup chokepoint between Java and Sumatra

name: Lombok Strait
throughput: Deep-water alternative to Malacca for large tankers
importance: Medium - Strategic for submarines and deep-draft vessels

name: Taiwan Strait
importance: High - Geopolitically contested, 50% of world's container ships pass through

name: Danish Straits (Great Belt, Little Belt, Øresund)
throughput: Baltic Sea-North Sea gateway, Russian oil exports
importance: Medium - Only route for Baltic nations to Atlantic, NATO strategic interest

name: Mozambique Channel
throughput: 30% of global tanker traffic around Cape of Good Hope
importance: Medium - Alternative to Suez for Asia-Europe oil/LNG trade

name: Cape Horn / Drake Passage
importance: Low - Historical importance, now backup route for oversized vessels
